channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Jobb’s try-saving tackle helps Blitzboks reach Spain Sevens semi-finals
item.description: The Blitzboks produced a gritty comeback performance to defeat hosts Spain 14-12 in their Cup quarter-final at the Valladolid Sevens, securing a place in the semi-finals of the SVNS World Championship...

item.title: Caraga teen boxer wins Palarong Pambansa gold and aims for international boxing career
item.description: Lorenz Kit Pallares, a 17-year-old student from Las Nieves National High School in Agusan del Norte, won the gold medal in the secondary boys’ flyweight boxing category at the 2026 Palarong Pambansa h...

item.title: Arteta praises PSG after Arsenal lose Champions League final on penalties
item.description: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta has praised Paris Saint-Germain after his side lost the UEFA Champions League final on penalties in Budapest. The match ended 1-1 after extra time, with PSG eventually win...

item.title: 45 detained as PSG Champions League celebrations in Paris turn disorderly
item.description: Paris witnessed large-scale celebrations after Paris Saint-Germain (PSG) secured their second UEFA Champions League title, defeating Arsenal on penalties in a dramatic final held in Budapest. Thousand...

item.title: Call for unity and lawful governance amid immigration tensions in South Africa
item.description: The opinion piece reflects on Africa Day and rising tensions in South Africa around immigration, warning against blaming foreign nationals for the country’s deep social and economic challenges. It ack...

item.title: Former Marks & Spencer chief appointed to support government strategy on youth unemployment
item.description: The UK government has appointed former Marks & Spencer chief executive Marc Bolland to help address rising youth unemployment, following concerns highlighted in a major independent review. The review,...

item.title: NDIS Budget Cuts Highlight Disparities in Government Priorities
item.description: More than two weeks after the Albanese government handed down the federal budget, criticism continues over its impact on Australians with disabilities. According to Greg Jericho, Guardian columnist an...

item.title: Trump announced as headliner for U.S. 250th anniversary fair amid artist withdrawals
item.description: Former U.S. President Donald Trump is set to play a central role in an upcoming celebration marking America’s 250th anniversary, after several scheduled performers withdrew from the event. The large-s...

item.title: Finland eliminates Canada 4-2 to reach hockey world championship final against Switzerland
item.description: Finland secured a 4-2 comeback victory over Canada in the ice hockey world championship semi-final, booking its place in the final against Switzerland. The result ends Canada’s hopes of winning the to...

item.title: Researchers Propose Liver as a Potential Magnetoreceptor in Pigeons
item.description: For decades, scientists have been puzzled by the ability of homing pigeons to navigate back to their lofts from hundreds of miles away with remarkable accuracy. Traditional theories of avian navigatio...

item.title: Reporter and Pentagon correspondent dispute Trump official’s claims over UFC ticket outreach to U.S. troops
item.description: A public dispute emerged between Washington Post Pentagon reporter Dan Lamothe and Sean Parnell, Assistant Secretary of the Army for Manpower and Reserve Affairs, over reporting related to UFC ticket ...

item.title: Kelsea Ballerini Shares Photos in Sheer Metallic Dress and Updates Fans on Music and Life
item.description: Country singer Kelsea Ballerini recently shared a series of Instagram photos highlighting her life and career, including a striking image of her in a long-sleeve metallic sheer dress with web-like pat...

item.title: Importance of Children’s Welfare and Education in Society
item.description: Every year on May 27, people all over di world dey celebrate children because dem dey special and bring joy to families. Children na gifts from God and future leaders, so e important make we protect d...

item.title: Daily Word Spotlight: 'Atleta' for May 31, 2026
item.description: ABS-CBN, the leading media and entertainment company in the Philippines, introduces the Word of the Day for May 31, 2026, highlighting the term 'atleta.' The feature aims to promote learning and enric...

item.title: Pete Davidson Praises Kim Kardashian’s Work Ethic and Acting Skills on Podcast Appearance
item.description: Pete Davidson spoke positively about his ex-girlfriend Kim Kardashian during a recent appearance on his podcast alongside comedian Nikki Glaser. Although Davidson and Kardashian ended their nine-month...

item.title: NBDSA orders Aaj Tak to modify programme over Taj Mahal temple claim segment citing lack of neutrality
item.description: The News Broadcasting and Digital Standards Authority (NBDSA) has directed Aaj Tak to edit or suitably modify portions of a programme hosted by journalist Sudhir Chaudhary, which discussed claims that...

item.title: African Journalists Tour Ukraine and Moldova to Report on War Impacts and Food Security
item.description: A delegation of journalists from seven African countries has completed a study visit to Ukraine and Moldova to gain first-hand understanding of the ongoing effects of the Russia-Ukraine war. The media...

item.title: WHO Director-General discusses Ebola containment efforts in the Democratic Republic of Congo during CNN interview
item.description: CNN’s Clarissa Ward conducted an in-depth interview with Dr. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, the Director-General of the World Health Organization, while aboard a plane traveling over the Democratic Repub...

item.title: Government launches training and oversight to boost loan repayment among women and youth
item.description: Tanzania government don identify say one big problem affecting loan repayment among women and youth be poor financial literacy. To tackle this, dem roll out new programs wey go give beneficiaries prop...

item.title: Toronto police investigate fatal shooting of 27-year-old man near North York home; suspects sought
item.description: Toronto police are investigating a fatal shooting that claimed the life of a 27-year-old man in North York late Friday night. Officers were called to the area of Sheppard Avenue West and Magellan Driv...
